goals.title: Finish mctp_assembler_scratch end-to-end so it behaves per the approv...
goals.objective: Finish mctp_assembler_scratch end-to-end so it behaves per the approved requirements: AXI4 256-bit one-TLP-per-transaction ingress, interleaved per-Q MCTP assembly, 256-bit SRAM payload packing without holes, AXI read/FW visibility, per-Q FSM/register/status/error/drop accounting, coverage/mutation/signoff all green. Required criteria: happy-path single and multi-fragment assembly; interleaved queue assembly; payload packing alignment including 64B, unaligned-to-32B and 4KB boundary cases; AXI read path/FW descriptor visibility; packet-drop and assemble-drop conditions; regression that prior signoff blockers rtl_todo, scoreboard, coverage, mutation are closed; adversarial malformed/stale/misleading success checks. Evidence must include RED-to-GREEN tests, tmux manual QA transcripts, final ip_signoff status pass, wiki update, and reviewer approval.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: create session ulw-qa-mctp-happy and run PROJECT_ROOT=/Users/brian/Desktop/Project/brian_hw/common_ai_agent python3 mctp_assembler_scratch/tb/cocotb/test_runner.py with scenario focus covering SC_VALID_SINGLE_PACKET, SC_MULTI_FRAGMENT_TU64, SC_INTERLEAVE_TWO_KEYS, SC_FIRST_LAST_TLP_HEADERS; binary PASS iff test_runner exits 0, sim/fl_rtl_compare.json status is pass for those scenario/equivalence rows, and scoreboard_events rows for valid assembly have passed=true.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/evidence/C001-happy-assembly-tmux.txt plus RED proof evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-red-C001-happy.txt and GREEN proof evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-green-C001-happy.txt; cleanup receipt must show tmux session ulw-qa-mctp-happy killed and no tmux server left.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/evidence/C001-happy-assembly-tmux.txt; evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-red-C001-happy.txt; evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-green-C001-happy.txt | cleanup: killed tmux session ulw-qa-mctp-happy; verified session absent; no live worker agents

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: create session ulw-qa-mctp-edge and run targeted scenario/scoreboard flow for SC_UNALIGNED_SRAM_PACK_NO_HOLES, SC_MAX_TU_4096_129_BEATS, SC_AXI_READBACK_TRIM, SC_APB_REGS_PER_Q, all PD_* packet drop scenarios, and all AD_* assembly drop scenarios; binary PASS iff payload SRAM writes are contiguous/no-hole with correct strb/addr, AXI readback returns descriptor payload bytes, APB per-Q/debug/counter rows match FL, and all drop rows pass with no SRAM write and correct counter/reason.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/evidence/C002-edge-drop-readback-tmux.txt plus RED proof evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-red-C002-edge.txt and GREEN proof evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-green-C002-edge.txt; cleanup receipt must show tmux session ulw-qa-mctp-edge killed and no tmux server left.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/evidence/C002-edge-drop-readback-tmux.txt; evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-red-C002-edge.txt; evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-green-C002-edge.txt | cleanup: killed tmux session ulw-qa-mctp-edge; verified session absent; no live worker agents

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: create session ulw-qa-mctp-signoff and run full gate replay: verify_ssot, emit/check FL/CL/equivalence if applicable, derive_rtl_todos --audit-rtl, rtl_compile_report, dut_lint_report, test_runner, check_scoreboard_events --source-check --require-events, ssot_coverage_summary, mutation_guard --max-mutants 32, check_ip_signoff, wiki build_graph --check; binary PASS iff ip_signoff.json status=pass, failed gates empty, coverage status=pass, mutation status=pass with category kill-rate report, and wiki has no overclaim/stale authoritative mctp_assembler/ proof refs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/evidence/C003-full-signoff-tmux.txt plus RED proof evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-red-C003-signoff.txt and GREEN proof evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-green-C003-signoff.txt; cleanup receipt must show tmux session ulw-qa-mctp-signoff killed and no tmux server left.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/evidence/C003-full-signoff-tmux.txt; evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-red-C003-signoff.txt; evidence/mctp_assembler_scratch/ulw-green-C003-signoff.txt | cleanup: killed tmux session ulw-qa-mctp-signoff; verified session absent; no live worker agents

goals.blockedReason: Implementation and local signoff are complete: C001/C002/C003 pass, post-cleanup signoff 15/15 pass, rtl_todo audit gate pass, wiki graph check pass. Final complete checkpoint is blocked only by a legacy completed Codex goal objective mismatch in this thread; see codex-goal-final.json and G001-quality-gate.json.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e78f6-947a-7d00-a244-58cefce570bd/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
